use_cases: Interactive 3D button with press animation effect for user actions
Primary call-to-action button with multiple color variants and responsive sizing
Accessible button component with focus rings and disabled state handling
ai_summary: A 3D pressable button component with multiple color variants (primary, secondary, success, danger, warning) and responsive sizing options (sm, md, lg). Features a realistic press animation with box shadow and scale effects using Framer Motion. The button has a skeuomorphic 3D depth effect created with thick bottom borders and dynamic shadows that change on hover and press.
